narrative:
New Franklin 1-C (precinct in Summit County) has 772 registered voters, with 56.1% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 21.5% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 22.4%, a narrow Democratic lean of 0.9 percentage points.
